description: The security system detects an unknown device connected to a corporate network port. The agent must investigate.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the alert and identify the switch port the device is connected to.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the specific switch and port from the alert.

nodes.task_description: Remotely disable the switch port to disconnect the device from the network.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully shuts down the port.

nodes.task_description: Create a security incident report and assign it to the physical security team to investigate the location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed security report for further investigation.
